case_title: DAVID HIRTZ VS. MAE C. WOO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DIRECTING SERVICE ON DEFENDANT LIMITED PARTNERSHIP BY DELIVERY OF PROCESS TO SECRETARY OF STATE - APPLICATION IS DENIED - SERVICE OF PROCESS BY THE SECRETARY OF STATE IS FOR OUT OF STATE CORPORATION WITH NO AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WITHIN CALIFORNIA. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AGAINST DEFENDANTS WHO RESIDE WITHIN CALIFORNIA.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
